title: narcissus × rugulosus
intro: Narcissus × rugulosus, also known as the bulbous narcissus or winter aconite, is a hybrid plant that combines the characteristics of the daffodil and the winter aconite, resulting in a unique and delicate bloom. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Narcissus × rugulosus include its ability to reduce anxiety, improve mood, and boost the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Narcissus × rugulosus often include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
